evals.prompt: 帮我看看 openclaw/openclaw 最近两个版本更新了什么，直接给结构化结果。
evals.expected_output: Returns stable JSON for a repository that should resolve through CHANGELOG.
expectations: Top-level output contains schema_version, generated_at, query, stats, and results.
results[0].repo is normalized to openclaw/openclaw.
results[0].status equals ok.
results[0].source equals changelog when the repository changelog is available.
For changelog-sourced results, published_at is only set when a matching GitHub Release confirms the version.
If the latest changelog version is ahead of recent releases, notes explain that it is not yet confirmed instead of treating it as a formal publish time.

evals.prompt: 查一下 anomalyco/opencode 最近更新，保留详细条目；如果没有 changelog，就自动回退到 releases。
evals.expected_output: Returns stable JSON for a repository that may resolve through Releases and includes details when requested.
expectations: Top-level output keeps the stable schema.
results[0].repo is normalized to anomalyco/opencode.
results[0].latest_details exists when details are requested.
results[0].previous_details exists when details are requested.
The result remains valid whether source is changelog or releases.

evals.prompt: 这个地址能不能直接识别？https://github.com/owner/repo
evals.expected_output: Normalizes GitHub URL input and still returns the same stable schema.
expectations: The input is normalized into owner/repo format in the result.
The output still contains the same top-level schema fields.
The result shape stays stable even if the repository does not exist.

evals.prompt: bad repo 这个仓库名是不是不合法？
evals.expected_output: Returns an invalid_repo error for malformed repository input.
expectations: results[0].status equals error.
results[0].source equals error.
results[0].repo is null.
results[0].error_code equals invalid_repo.

evals.prompt: 我一次想查 11 个仓库，这个技能会怎么处理？
expectations: The command rejects requests larger than 10 repositories.
The failure happens before repository fetching starts.
The caller is instructed to split the request.

evals.prompt: 请用 --details 的结果格式返回 farion1231/cc-switch 最近两个版本更新。
evals.expected_output: Returns stable JSON with detailed changelog entries for a repository with long-form changelog notes.
expectations: results[0].status equals ok.
results[0].source usually resolves to changelog.
results[0].latest_details contains actionable changelog entries.
Generic stats-only lines should not dominate the top-level highlights.

evals.prompt: 帮我看看 openai/codex 最近的预发布版本更新，直接返回结构化结果。
evals.expected_output: Returns stable JSON even when the latest release note is very short or mostly just a release title.
expectations: The output keeps the stable schema for prerelease tags.
The result may use releases as the source.
If the release body is too short, notes should explain that the release notes are minimal instead of inventing highlights.

evals.prompt: 如果某个仓库的 CHANGELOG 最新版本比 GitHub Release 更靠前，别把它直接当正式发布时间，给我结构化结果。
evals.expected_output: Returns stable JSON that keeps changelog content but only treats published_at as official when a matching release confirms it.
expectations: The output keeps the same stable schema.
The skill may still use changelog as the content source.
published_at remains null when the changelog version is not confirmed by recent GitHub Releases.
notes explain that the changelog entry may be prewritten or pending release.
